$comment: Phase 4 (#14) — incremental TypeScript adoption. checkJs type-checks ONLY new/typed code (lib, types, tests, api) so tsc stays green while the legacy IIFE migrates view-by-view. Run: npx tsc --noEmit
$comment_include: Scoped to the typed surface. e2e specs are type-checked by Playwright's own runner (it provides @playwright/test + node types); contract tests run under node --test.
